title: Livoni Fly Zapper, Bug Zapper Insect Pest Fly Killer, Electric Mosquito Zapper for Indoor and Outdoor Waterproof Mosquito Killer for Flying Insect Control Lamp
bullet_points: ⚡ Precision Ultraviolet Trapping: The bug zapper utilizes a specialized ultraviolet spectrum of 365-395nm to precisely and efficiently attract mosquitoes, moths, flies, and other phototactic flying insects. An internal multi-layered, interlaced stainless steel high-voltage grid instantly generates a powerful electric arc upon insect contact, ensuring complete elimination.

⚡ Safe and Non-Toxic for Peace of Mind: The fly zapper utilizes purely physical mosquito elimination without releasing any chemicals. Attracts insects through specific wavelengths of ultraviolet/blue light. Emits no irritating odors, making it safe for pregnant women, infants, and pets in the home. Can be used safely overnight.
⚡ Dual-Action Powerful Trapping: Combines ultraviolet light attraction with an electric shock system for twice the effectiveness, significantly reducing indoor insects.
⚡ Safety Guard Mesh: A fine-mesh protective cover surrounds the grid, preventing fingers or pets from reaching inside and effectively guarding against accidental electrocution.

⚡ Widely Applicable: Supports wall mounting and can be flexibly placed in rooms with active flying insects, kitchens, courtyards, balconies, garages, patios, restaurant kitchens, and various other environments. Plug-and-play with low power consumption, it's a powerful solution for eliminating mosquitoes during garden parties and outdoor camping.
